summary: Inventory found 66 accepted completed non-active ingest sources missing from canonical sources and wiki source pages.
details: The read-only inventory subagent counted 1,338 completed accepted ingest runs excluding active wave 14. Of these, 66 accepted non-active sources are missing from data/canonical/sources.jsonl and lack wiki/sources/<source_id>.md. Examples include jamaica, mta_automated_camera_enforcement, open_data_lessons_2026, queens_proposed_final_plan_addendum_2024, and queens_service_change_board_item_2025.
suggested_action: After active ingest is quiescent, run deterministic materialize and re-check source-page/canonical source coverage before writer batches depend on those sources.

summary: Validation snapshot reports 1,196 duplicate_global_identity issues while provider-based dedup commands are forbidden for this workflow.
details: The current Codex-only post-ingest path cannot use campaign dedup or identity-review-run. Duplicate identity work therefore needs manual Codex triage, deterministic grouping/reporting, or explicit future approval for a separate provider-backed identity pass.
suggested_action: Create deterministic duplicate clusters for human/Codex review notes first; do not run provider-backed dedup in this workflow.

summary: Validation snapshot reports 178 relation endpoint shape errors; relation_135421-nyct-subway-bus-ops is a representative example.
details: The validator reported relation_135421-nyct-subway-bus-ops as operated_by with entity -> entity endpoints where the ontology expects project|route -> entity. Similar issues include claim/treatment/source endpoints attached through relation kinds whose allowed subject/object kinds do not match current canonical record kinds.
suggested_action: Triage relation errors by relation_kind and endpoint record_kind. For high-confidence cases, convert to a semantically valid relation kind or retire the relation into a review note; otherwise leave as validation backlog.

summary: Validation snapshot reports 60 relations missing local observation endpoint metadata; relation_bt-part-of-mta is a representative example.
details: The validator reported relation_bt-part-of-mta as missing payload.object_local_observation_id. These records may have canonical endpoint ids but lack the local observation ids needed for auditability and validation.
suggested_action: For each missing local-observation relation, inspect the source submission and canonical endpoint records. Add a structured review note or manual correction only when the endpoint local observation is source-backed and unambiguous.
